use_case: 18 business case study simulations for Lo! Foods brand strategy research across sub-brands, channels, pricing, and consumer segments in Indian health food market.
notes: Real brand name used throughout. Interventions emerge dynamically from probing phase — not pre-set. All personas are India-grounded with Sarvam cultural layer enabled. B2B professional personas (P1-P4) run full 8-phase simulation including personal health beliefs.

target_segments.name: Keto Lifestyle Follower
target_segments.notes: Strict keto adherent — tracks macros, reads ingredient lists carefully. Skeptical of Indian keto brands ('non-keto ingredients, fake ratings' concern from dLife/Reddit). Has likely tried Lo! Foods or evaluated it. May have DIY keto food preference.
